title: [Zrenigotham House, Orchard]
description: Nestled in a quiet meadow under a silver-lit sky, the orchard rests in moonlight, rows of tall trees casting soft shadows, their ripe fruit glowing faintly in the cool night air.  A nearby garden whispers with life, its blooms muted but vivid in the pale glow.  The pond shimmers, still and inviting beneath the stars.  In a moon-dappled clearing, perfect for quiet reflection, a sprawling stone manor rises in the distance - still, timeless, and bathed in ethereal light.  An arched modwir gate provides access to the wilds beyond
room.location: Zrenigotham House, inside the frontier town of Wehnimer's Landing
